title: Falconer, Crawford - Second Permanent Secretary and Chief Trade Negotiation Adviser at the Department for Business and Trade - ACOBA Advice
body: "Sir Crawford left his role at the Department for Business and Trade in December 2024.  Senior Advisor, Bradshaw Advisory Ltd Sir Crawford sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a paid role with Bradshaw Advisory Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2025; and the role was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
